zh.lifeSummary: 當George Woodward於1549年4月10日出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Sir John Woodward25歲，母親Lady Margaret Bulstrode26歲。他於1580年1月6日與Elizabeth Honywood在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 海倫 比曉普斯蓋特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和15個女兒的父母。他於1579年在英國波克夏溫莎女爵 卡素被列為clerk of the works。他去世於1598年1月30日在英國英格蘭波克夏厄普頓享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏厄普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Woodward于1549年4月10日出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Sir John Woodward25岁，母亲Lady Margaret Bulstrode26岁。他于1580年1月6日与Elizabeth Honywood在英国英格兰倫敦聖 海倫 比曉普斯蓋特结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和15个女儿的父母。他于1579年在英国波克夏溫莎女爵 卡素被列为clerk of the works。他去世于1598年1月30日在英国英格兰波克夏厄普頓享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏厄普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Woodward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

variants.name: Woodard
meanings: from the Norman Old French personal name Odard, Udard, Middle English Wodard, Wudard. It derives from the ancient Germanic name Authard, Othard, Odard, composed of the elements aud- ‘riches' + hard- ‘hard, bold’.
occupational name from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + herde ‘herd’ (Old English wudu + hierde), for a person who tended animals pastured in woodland.

variants.name: Woodworth
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Woodward or Wadworth, the latter being a habitational name from Wadworth in Yorkshire, which is derived from the Old English personal name Wada, Wadda + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Woodman
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When George Woodward was born on 10 April 1549, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Woodward, was 25 and his mother, Lady Margaret Bulstrode, was 26. He married Elizabeth Honywood on 6 January 1580, in St Helen Bishopsgate, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 15 daughters. In 1579, at the age of 30, his occupation is listed as clerk of the works in Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England. He died on 30 January 1598, in Upton, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Upton, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Woodward est né le 10 avril 1549, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Woodward, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Bulstrode, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Honywood le 6 janvier 1580, à St Helen Bishopsgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 15 filles. En 1579, à l’âge de 30 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est clerk of the works à Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 30 janvier 1598, à Upton, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Upton, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Woodward am 10. April 1549 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Woodward 25 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Bulstrode 26. Er hat am 6. Januar 1580 in St Helen Bishopsgate, London, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Honywood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 15 Töchter. 1579, als er 30 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als clerk of the works in Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. Januar 1598 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Upton, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Upton, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Woodward è nato il il 10 aprile 1549 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Woodward, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Bulstrode, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Honywood il 6 gennaio 1580, nel St Helen Bishopsgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 15 figlie. Nel 1579, all'età di 30 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come clerk of the works nel Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England. Morì il 30 gennaio 1598, nel Upton, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Upton, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: George Woodwardが1549年4月10日にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John Woodwardは25歳，母Lady Margaret Bulstrodeは26歳であった。1580年1月6日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト ヘレン ビショプスガトでElizabeth Honywoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と15人の娘の親であった。1579年，30歳の時，イギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソル カストルでの職業はclerk of the worksと記録されている。彼は1598年1月30日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアウプトンで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアウプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.St Helen Bishopsgate, London, England, U: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 헬 비숍스가트
ko.Ely St Mary, Cambridgeshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 엘리 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: George Woodward(이)가 1549년 4월 10일 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Woodward(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Bulstrode(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1580년 1월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 헬 비숍스가트에서 Elizabeth Honywood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 1579년, 30세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 버크실르 윈드소르 카스틀에서 clerk of the works이었다. 그는 1598년 1월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 업턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 업턴에 묻혔다.

pt.10 April 1549–30 January 1598: 10 de abril de 1549–30 de janeiro de 1598
pt.St Helen Bishopsgate, London, England, U: St Helen Bishopsgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Ely St Mary, Cambridgeshire, England: Ely St Mary, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Woodward nasceu em 10 de abril de 1549, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Woodward, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Bulstrode, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Honywood em 6 de janeiro de 1580, em St Helen Bishopsgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 15 filhas. Em 1579, com 30 anos, sua profissão aparece como clerk of the works em Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 30 de janeiro de 1598, em Upton, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Upton, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Helen Bishopsgate, London, England, U: ст хелен бишопсгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Ely St Mary, Cambridgeshire, England: эли ст мэри, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Woodward родился 10 апреля 1549 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Woodward было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Bulstrode, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Honywood 6 января 1580 г. в местности ст хелен бишопсгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 15 дочерей. В 1579 году, в возрасте 30 лет,  он работал по профессии clerk of the works в местности виндзор кастл, биркшир, Англия. Он умер 30 января 1598 г. в местности уптон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности уптон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.St Helen Bishopsgate, London, England, U: St Helen Bishopsgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Ely St Mary, Cambridgeshire, England: Ely St Mary, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Woodward nació el 10 de abril de 1549, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Woodward, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Bulstrode, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Honywood el 6 de enero de 1580, en St Helen Bishopsgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 15 hijas. En 1579, a la edad de 30 años, su ocupación registrada era clerk of the works en Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 30 de enero de 1598, en Upton, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Upton, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
